_comment: bypassPermissions ONLY ships because the PreToolUse hook suite below enforces hard blocks in EVERY permission mode — the bypass is earned by the hooks. If you remove or weaken the hooks, remove bypassPermissions too. The permissions.deny rules are a SECOND, native layer: deny hard-blocks even under bypassPermissions and even if the hooks were removed (see docs/SECURITY.md). Distilled from todoclaw .claude/settings.json, in production 2026-06-23 → 2026-07-03.
_path_note: Replace {{NODE_BIN_PATH}} with your Node bin dir (e.g. $HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.23.0/bin) — version managers like nvm do not apply in non-interactive shells, so Claude Code needs the resolved path. Machine-specific values can instead live in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored), whose env keys override this file. See PLACEHOLDERS.md.
